title: OpenSeeker-v2: Simple SFT is Surprisingly Powerful for Frontier Search Agents

defines.name: OpenSeeker-v2
defines.definition: An upgraded frontier search agent trained with simple supervised fine-tuning on high-difficulty trajectories to achieve state-of-the-art search performance.

problem: Existing frontier search agents are typically trained with complex, resource-intensive CPT+SFT+RL pipelines that create a high barrier for academic and open-source development.
